ingredients.item:
CHICKEN
1½ pounds (680 g) boneless, skinless chicken breasts (about 4 large breasts)
1 teaspoon kosher salt
ingredients.original:
CHICKEN
1½ pounds (680 g) boneless, skinless chicken breasts (about 4 large breasts)
1 teaspoon kosher salt

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
Lemon slices
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
Lemon slices

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: Place a chicken breast on a cutting board and hold it flat with the palm of your non-knife-holding hand. Using a sharp chef’s knife, slice the chicken breast horizontally into 2 even cutlets using as few strokes as possible for a smooth finish. Repeat with the remaining chicken breasts.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: Place a chicken breast on a cutting board and hold it flat with the palm of your non-knife-holding hand. Using a sharp chef’s knife, slice the chicken breast horizontally into 2 even cutlets using as few strokes as possible for a smooth finish. Repeat with the remaining chicken breasts.

ingredients.item: 2 In a large bowl, mix together the salt, 1 teaspoon onion powder, 1 teaspoon garlic powder, parsley flakes, 1 teaspoon paprika, and pepper. Add the chicken cutlets and thoroughly coat with the seasoning mix.
ingredients.original: 2 In a large bowl, mix together the salt, 1 teaspoon onion powder, 1 teaspoon garlic powder, parsley flakes, 1 teaspoon paprika, and pepper. Add the chicken cutlets and thoroughly coat with the seasoning mix.

ingredients.item: 3 In a large 2-inch-deep (5 cm) skillet, heat the oil and butter over medium heat. Add the chicken cutlets, working in batches so as to avoid overcrowding, and sear for 2 minutes on each side until golden. Transfer to a plate.
ingredients.original: 3 In a large 2-inch-deep (5 cm) skillet, heat the oil and butter over medium heat. Add the chicken cutlets, working in batches so as to avoid overcrowding, and sear for 2 minutes on each side until golden. Transfer to a plate.

ingredients.item: 4 TO MAKE THE ORZO: Bloom the saffron by grinding the strands into a powder using a mortar and pestle. Place the powder in a small bowl, pour in the hot water, and let sit for 5 minutes.
ingredients.original: 4 TO MAKE THE ORZO: Bloom the saffron by grinding the strands into a powder using a mortar and pestle. Place the powder in a small bowl, pour in the hot water, and let sit for 5 minutes.
